# Daily Report — 2026-05-08

## Task Completed
Added `list_catalogs` and `get_catalog` tools targeting the `sc_catalog` table.
`list_catalogs` supports `active`, `query`, `limit`, and `offset` filters.
`get_catalog` fetches a single catalog by sys_id with a 404 guard.
Both tools registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml`
(catalog_builder and full packages). The long-standing `# TODO: not yet implemented`
comments in `tool_packages.yaml` have been removed.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 951
- Coverage: 91%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level packages (pip, setuptools, wheel, pyjwt) have known CVEs — these are
unrelated to the project's own dependencies and pre-exist in the sandbox environment.
Project dependencies are clean.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/catalog_tools.py` — added `ListCatalogsParams`, `GetCatalogParams`, `list_catalogs`, `get_catalog`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — registered new functions and exports
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — added imports and TOOL_REGISTRY entries
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added tools to catalog_builder and full packages, removed TODO comments
- `tests/test_catalog_list_get.py` — 20 new tests (params, list, get, error paths, pagination, filters)

## Next Up
Add problem management tools (list_problems, get_problem, create_problem, update_problem)
